title: Epic Adventure Craft Network Modpack
description: The official modpack made for the Epic Adventure Craft Network!
body:
> ![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bb7fad6f7927eaf1729bfa45828a1b44f834b84.png)

The official modpack made for the Epic Adventure Craft Network! This modpack creates a more fun and immersive play-style for you while you're playing on the network. Highly recommended if you prefer an adventurous experience!

> ![Use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd34548bb1df9f3cb5d1a89b6243af0e8be7a984.png)

1. Download the Modrinth application
2. Search for Epic Adventure Craft Network Modpack or use the link in our [Discord](https://discord.gg/hx4wath2Sc) and install it
3. On Modrinth run the modpack and enjoy playing!

> ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c29be2d2264da78e5f298f3d3eb59cf0302a053.png)

Visual + Ambient changes.
This pack uses vanilla tweaking mods that change the hud, animations and ambience of Minecraft while keeping a vanilla experience!
Includes an armor durability and effect hotbar, potion time left checker and more things may come in the future.
Also includes visual mods like shaders, resourcepacks and Distant Horizons!

To further increase immersion and fun the Voicechat Mod is added in this pack as well!

> ![Optimization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dc0428ed8d85238060085e29d383d6570f056b9.png)

This pack also include game optimizers like Iris and Sodium to decrease lag significantly.
These mods are also responsible for making the new animations work!
